item.title: IAM the Captain Now – Hijacking Azure Identity Access
item.description: <p>I decided to spend some research time diving in depth into Identity and Access Management (IAM) within Microsoft Azure. I am going to show you within this blog how IAM permissions can be abused within an Azure…</p>

item.title: Benchmarking Self-Hosted LLMs for Offensive Security
item.description: <p>We put LLMs to the test—let's find out how good AI is at hacking! We walk through six simple challenges with intentionally naïve setups to test how capable each model is at single-step exploit validation.</p>

item.title: Dungeons and Daemons
item.description: <p>Play Roll for Initiative. Hack the Planet.Dungeons &amp; Daemons is a cybersecurity RPG that drops you into the boots of a Red Team operator on a live engagement. Your mission: infiltrate a corporate facility,…</p>

item.title: Mythos, Memory Loss, and the Part InfoSec Keeps Missing
item.description: <p>InfoSec has a bad habit of acting like history started this morning. Something new lands, the industry loses its mind for a week, vendors start talking like the old rules no longer apply, and half the industry suddenly…</p>

item.title: Kerberos with Titanis
item.description: <p>In this article, I’ll walk you through the basics of Kerberos, how to use Titanis for the different parts, and how to mitigate some problems.Titanis SetupI use Titanis tools throughout this article to demonstrate…</p>

item.title: ARP Around and Find Out: Hijacking GPO UNC Paths for Code Execution and NTLM Relay
item.description: <p>TL;DR - If you have WriteGPLink on an Active Directory Organizational Unit (OU) and you’re on the same network segment as a computer within that OU, you can abuse that permission to link an existing Group Policy Objects…</p>

item.title: The Defensive Stack is Exposed: LLMs, Reverse Engineering, and the End of Opaque Defense
item.description: <p>Everyone is talking about LLMs finding zero days. That is not the only story. The story is what happens when you point these models at the defensive tools organizations depend on for first line defense. AI is changing…</p>

item.title: GRC in an AI World - Staying in the Fast Lane Without Losing the Race!
item.description: <p>Artificial Intelligence (AI) is the new buzz word on the streets. It’s becoming “the best thing since sliced bread” in the IT world and is being used by everyone from executives to employees, students, and even young…</p>

item.title: Slamming the Door on Quick Assist Tech Support Scams and Abuse
item.description: <p>Tech support scams are simple by design—just a trusted tool and a convincing story. We break down Microsoft Windows Quick Assist as an attack vector, detection strategies, and how to close the door for good.</p>

item.title: Finding Your Way on the Passkey Path
item.description: <p>Ready to ditch passwords for good, but not sure where to start? Introducing Passkey Path, a choose-your-own-adventure guide to transitioning from passwords to passkeys, built for every role in your organization.</p>
